The '''''Foresight''''' was a [[MC30c frigate/Legends|MC30c frigate]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] as a surveyor [[Starship/Legends|starship]].

Assigned to [[Operation Flotsam]], ''Foresight'' aided in the process of clearing battle sites of dangerous materials and exploring abandoned starships for valuable information. While attempting to recover artifacts from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] hulk in [[15 ABY/Legends|15 ABY]], the cruiser's [[Autofiring laser cannon|automatic firing sensors]] detected ''Foresight'' and fired upon it, destroying it.
